SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAICES, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BISHOP, SHAWN RECOLOGY GOLDEN GATE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT, RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO, IS CHANGED TO REFLECT THE TRUE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT, RECOLOGY GOLDEN GATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
